files.description: Contributor guide for native UI localization — required pattern, scope, exceptions, and platform-localization sync workflow
Generated English locale keys (SdkTranslationKey source of truth) — synced from platform-localization; do not hand-edit
Generated Spanish locale — synced from platform-localization; do not hand-edit
Generated French locale — synced from platform-localization; do not hand-edit
Hand-editable locale registration — add new locale codes here when distribution adds them
SDK-owned i18next instance and locale prop scope
DOM/WebView copy exempt from native i18n — English only
App locale vs Bible languageId — do not conflate
